items.headline: Oil surges, stocks fall as Trump says to blockade Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Oil prices surged and stocks sank Monday after U.S.-Iran peace talks fell apart and Donald Trump announced a blockade of the strategic Strait of Hormuz, adding to fears of energy supplies from the Middle East.

items.headline: Oil Prices Surge Past $100 as Trump Announces Hormuz Blockade Amid Fragile Iran Ceasefire
items.summary: NEW YORK — Global oil prices jumped sharply Monday as President Donald Trump ordered a U.S. naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, reigniting fears of prolonged supply disruptions in the world's most critical energy chokepoint.

items.headline: Two Oil Tankers Attempt Hormuz Exit After US Announces Blockade
items.summary: Two fuel tankers are attempting to exit the Persian Gulf via the Strait of Hormuz by sailing close to the Iranian coast, the first vessels to try and pass through the waterway since the US announced a blockade.

items.headline: Crude oil tankers steer clear of Hormuz ahead of US blockade
items.summary: Move follows an announcement that U.S. forces would begin implementing ‌the blockade of all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports on Monday.
